# Adaptation Living LLC

> Veteran-founded AI automation studio in Phoenix, AZ. Custom web development, CRM setup, AI voice and chat agents, review automation, workflow automation, and app development for small businesses, law firms, and mitigation specialists.

## About

Adaptation Living LLC is a veteran-founded digital solutions company specializing in AI integration, custom website development, CRM automation, and digital marketing. Founded in 2021 by Brandon Bible, we build every site and system from scratch, delivering tailored infrastructure that drives measurable results. Our proprietary platform connects lead generation, AI-powered call handling, social media automation, review management, and 1,800+ business tools into one dashboard. We serve law firms, mitigation specialists, medical practices, retail, and service businesses across industries with bilingual web development, SMS-enabled CRM, SEO, PPC, and full-scale digital transformation.

## Services

- AI Voice Agents and AI Chat Agents
- Custom Web Development
- CRM Setup and Automation
- SEO and Digital Marketing
- Workflow Automation
- iOS and Android App Development
- Branding and Design
- Review and Reputation Management
- Appointment Booking and Calendar Automation
- Email and SMS Marketing
